rules: Do NOT use Inter for headings.
Use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines/labels (e.g., sensor names).
Metric values (e.g., pH 7.2) must use JetBrains Mono to look like a terminal/dashboard.

layout.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout.spacing: Generous spacing between sections, tight spacing within cards

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (#262626), no shadow. Rounded max 8px.
surfaces.header: Solid background (#0A0A0A) with a hard bottom border (#262626). z-50.

components_strategy.charts: Recharts for Wash Session History (Area/Line chart) with hidden grid lines and mono tooltips.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

auth_login.layout: Split screen: left side industrial background image with overlay, right side login form.

sections: Header: Logo, Profile Menu, PWA Push Notification Bell Toggle.
KPI Widgets: pH Level (Value + Gauge), Turbidity NTU, AI Cleanliness Score.
Live Camera Feed: Large widget showing the current vegetable washing view.
Manual Controls: DC Motor Speed (Slider), Water Nozzle (Switch), Push Servo (Button).
Mode Selector: Toggle between Manual and Automatic mode (with threshold settings popup).
History Chart: Wide widget for session history graphs.

image_urls.description: Industrial vegetable washing machine - For Login Page background
Live camera feed view of vegetables being washed in water

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure complete responsive layout, mobile first (HP layout is crucial).
Install and use 'recharts' for data visualization.
Implement local state mock logic for dashboard data, sensors, slider, toggle.
Add fonts via Google Fonts import in index.html (Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono).
